analysis: The current project has a basic structure for a black holes-themed website, but the UI lacks cohesive cosmic theming, animations, and interactive elements. The theme should be enhanced with dark cosmic colors, swirling animations, glowing elements, and black hole visuals. The navigation and content areas need to be more engaging and mobile-friendly.

improvements.description: Enhance the CSS with a dark cosmic theme, including swirling animations, glowing elements, and black hole visuals. Add smooth transitions and interactive hover effects.

Complete the HTML content to include all sections related to black holes, such as the main content area with interactive planets, animated slides, and a mobile-friendly navigation menu with a hamburger icon.
Fix syntax errors and complete the JavaScript content to ensure all functions are properly implemented, including the mobile menu toggle functionality and interactive elements.
